text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ugh! It's still bright and sunny over here, so why?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk into the training room to find an
irritated-looking El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Here I was thinkin' my papa was going to
compliment me for getting my lap time down...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But he fell asleep 'cause of the time difference!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Stupid time difference... I oughtta give it a
German suplex!
